import React,{useState}from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./Login.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API_BASE_URL='https://3001-firebase-studio-1750940658370.cluster-ombtxv25tbd6yrjpp3lukp6zhc.cloudworkstations.dev';function Login(){const[email,setEmail]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const[message,setMessage]=useState('');const handleLogin=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const response=await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/api/login`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email,password})});const data=await response.json();setMessage(data.message);if(response.ok){// Handle successful login, e.g., redirect or update state
console.log('Login successful',data);}}catch(error){console.error('Login error:',error);setMessage('Failed to connect to the server.');}};const handleSocialLogin=provider=>{window.location.href=`${API_BASE_URL}/auth/${provider}`;};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("section",{id:"login",className:"content-section auth-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleLogin,className:"auth-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"email",children:"Email"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",id:"email",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value),required:true})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"form-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"password",children:"Password"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",id:"password",value:password,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value),required:true})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"auth-btn",children:"Login"})]}),message&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"auth-message",children:message}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"social-login",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Or login with"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleSocialLogin('google'),className:"social-btn google",children:"Google"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleSocialLogin('facebook'),className:"social-btn facebook",children:"Facebook"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>handleSocialLogin('github'),className:"social-btn github",children:"GitHub"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{className:"auth-switch",children:["Don't have an account? ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/register",children:"Register here"})]})]});}export default Login;
